perfect6502
===========

Upstream: https://github.com/mist64/perfect6502
License: MIT
Purpose: Optional NMOS 6502 transistor-level reference tests for QE6502.

Pinned revision:
  09fc542877a84318291aa42dab143a3e2c3db974

Snapshot date: 20.06.2026

Local modifications:
  None.

Notes:
  This code is vendored only for optional test/reference builds.
  It is not part of the QE6502 runtime library, public API, install target,
  or exported CMake package.
